turns.learner_turn: Okay, so the answer is 36 more balloons touching the ceiling than on the floor. 36-14 = 22. So the answer is 22.

Now try this similar problem on your own without any hints. Show your reasoning step by step:

While preparing balloons for Eva's birthday party, her mom bought 70.6 balloons and 1800cm³ of helium.
